title: Venetian Blind Cleaner Tool and 2-in-1 Window Blind Duster Cleaner Brush with Removable Washable Microfibre Sleeves - Ideal for Air Conditioner Car AC Vent and More
features: Pack of 2 Blind Cleaners - The set for cleaning blinds comes with 2 duster for blinds that you can switch out to make dusting quicker and easier. You can wash and use the cloths again. This set is better at cleaning dust and helps you save time.

Practical Design - Simplify your cleaning routine with these user-friendly microfiber window blinds cleaner tool. Its special design makes cleaning blinds and shutters much easier. It can smoothly reach into tight spaces, making sure every corner gets cleaned well.

High Quality Material - The blinds cleaner handle is made from durable material, which means it's tough and will last a long time. The microfiber cover is soft and can be taken off easily for cleaning. It's really good at getting rid of tough stains in the spaces of the venetian blinds, plastic blinds or wooden blinds.

Removable & Washable - Enjoy the convenience of easy cleaning maintenance. Both the microfiber pad sleeves of these blind cleaners are machine washable, allowing you to refresh them for continued efficient use.

Versatile Application - Easily clean venetian blinds, air conditioner blinds, and car blinds all at once. Venetian blind cleaning tools is ideal for home, office, or car use and Window cleaner tool is suitable for both dry and wet cleaning methods.
description: From the brand Previous page Who is The Dustpan and Brush Store? The heritage of our company dates back to before 1959 and has been a family concern ever since. Long before the internet was around, we were talking face to face and exchanging goods while servicing the local community. Now with the Internet we are able to bring this to a much wider audience. Our Best Sellers Visit the store Indoor Brooms Visit the store Outdoor Brooms Visit the store Mops Visit the store Dustpan and Brush Sets Visit the store Why we love what we do? Cleaning is part of daily life and lets face it, its not always the most enjoyable task. We love to make cleaning easier for our customers and strive to do this everyday! What makes our products unique? As we have a heritage going back to 1959, we have a depth of knowledge and skill set which helps us develop new and unique products. Why should you try our products? We are a family firm that has decades of experience and amazing reviews. Join the hundreds of thousands of existing happy customers and see why we are the go to company for all your cleaning needs.
